internal_issues.description: SEC-1.9 asserted FSF formula consumes shadow geometry without direct code citation. EXP-165 pinned check_eclipse_fsf.py: fsf=(h/r)/(h_b/r_bou) — purely geometric. Published E001-E009 FSF values reproduce under V51 ellipse only (HAD: 1.513 vs published 1.471, ~3%), not V50.6 exponential (HAD: 1.894, ~29% error). Eclipse magnitude not an input.
